goal_results.evidence: .github/workflows/ci.yml created: triggers on pull_request and push to main, uses oven-sh/setup-bun@v2 with bun-version 1.3.5, runs 'bun install --frozen-lockfile', verifies lockfile with 'git diff --exit-code bun.lock'. All requirements satisfied.
.github/workflows/ci.yml has a single '- name: Verify' step with 'run: bun run verify'. No separate Lint, Typecheck, or Build steps exist. Verified by check_ci_single_verify test gate passing.
package.json scripts includes '"verify": "turbo run lint check-types test build"' — all four tasks present in the correct order. Verified by check_pkg_verify_script test gate passing.
turbo.json tasks section includes '"//#lint": {}' and '"test": {}'. Verified by check_turbo_tasks_added test gate passing.

package.json: build changed from 'turbo run build --filter=\'*\'' to 'turbo run build', dev from 'turbo run dev --filter=\'*\'' to 'turbo run dev', check-types from 'turbo run check-types --filter=\'*\'' to 'turbo run check-types'. No --filter='*' remains. Verified by check_pkg_no_filter_star test gate passing.

judge_notes: All 5 goals met. The agent's patch exactly matches the expected changes: CI workflow created with correct triggers/steps, single Verify step using bun run verify, verify script in package.json with correct turbo tasks in order, turbo.json updated with //#lint and test tasks, and --filter='*' removed from all scripts. All 5 verifier gates pass (ci_exists, pkg_verify_script, turbo_tasks_added, ci_single_verify, pkg_no_filter_star). Score = 0.36 + 0.36 + 0.09 + 0.09 + 0.10 = 1.00.
